contacts.name: account_manager
contacts.label: Account manager
contacts.description: Tracks the assigned account manager for a contact, ensuring personalized service.

contacts.name: preferred_communication_channel
contacts.label: Preferred communication channel
contacts.description: Helps track the preferred communication channel of a contact for effective engagement.

contacts.name: role
contacts.label: Role
contacts.description: Tracks the role of a contact, distinguishing administrators, decision makers, and end users which is crucial for targeting and engagement in B2B/B2C contexts.

contacts.name: technical_expertise
contacts.label: Technical expertise
contacts.description: Categorizes contacts based on their technical expertise to tailor communication and solutions.

deals.name: ai_tool_included
deals.label: AI tool included
deals.description: Tracks whether AI tools such as Smock-It, ChatBridge, or Lumi are included in the deal.

deals.name: implementation_timeline
deals.label: Implementation timeline
deals.description: Tracks the timeline for implementing Salesforce or AI solutions for a deal.

deals.name: number_of_licenses
deals.label: Number of licenses
deals.description: Tracks the number of licenses associated with a deal to enable precise contract management.

deals.name: subscription_duration
deals.label: Subscription duration
deals.description: Tracks the subscription duration for accurate billing and forecasting.

tickets.name: assigned_technician
tickets.label: Assigned technician
tickets.description: Tracks the technician assigned to a ticket for accountability and tracking.

tickets.name: issue_type
tickets.label: Issue type
tickets.description: Categorizes support tickets by issue type for efficient handling and reporting.

tickets.name: resolution_deadline
tickets.label: Resolution deadline
tickets.description: Tracks the deadline for resolving a ticket to ensure timely support.

tickets.name: support_urgency
tickets.label: Support urgency
tickets.description: Tracks the urgency level of support tickets to prioritize resolution effectively.

properties.name: hs_all_accessible_team_ids
properties.label: All teams
properties.description: The team IDs, including the team hierarchy, of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

properties.name: hs_all_assigned_business_unit_ids
properties.label: Business units
properties.description: The business units this record is assigned to.

properties.name: hs_all_owner_ids
properties.label: All owner IDs
properties.description: Values of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

properties.name: hs_all_team_ids
properties.label: All team IDs
properties.description: The team IDs of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

properties.name: hs_created_by_user_id
properties.label: Created by user ID
properties.description: The user who created this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

properties.name: hs_createdate
properties.label: Object create date/time
properties.description: The date and time at which this object was created. This value is automatically set by HubSpot and may not be modified.

properties.name: hs_lastmodifieddate
properties.label: Object last modified date/time
properties.description: Most recent timestamp of any property update for this object. This includes HubSpot internal properties, which can be visible or hidden. This property is updated automatically.

properties.name: hs_merged_object_ids
properties.label: Merged record IDs
properties.description: The list of record IDs that have been merged into this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

properties.name: hs_object_id
properties.label: Record ID
properties.description: The unique ID for this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

properties.name: hs_object_source
properties.label: Record creation source
properties.description: Raw internal PropertySource present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

properties.name: hs_object_source_detail_1
properties.label: Record source detail 1
properties.description: First level of detail on how this record was created.

properties.name: hs_object_source_detail_2
properties.label: Record source detail 2
properties.description: Second level of detail on how this record was created.

properties.name: hs_object_source_detail_3
properties.label: Record source detail 3
properties.description: Third level of detail on how this record was created.

properties.name: hs_object_source_id
properties.label: Record creation source ID
properties.description: Raw internal sourceId present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

properties.name: hs_object_source_label
properties.label: Record source
properties.description: How this record was created.

properties.name: hs_object_source_user_id
properties.label: Record creation source user ID
properties.description: Raw internal userId present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

properties.name: hs_owning_teams
properties.label: Owning Teams
properties.description: The teams that are attributed to this record.

properties.name: hs_pinned_engagement_id
properties.label: Pinned Engagement ID
properties.description: The object ID of the current pinned engagement. This will only be shown in the app if there is already an association to the engagement.

properties.name: hs_read_only
properties.label: Read only object
properties.description: Determines whether a record can be edited by a user.

properties.name: hs_shared_team_ids
properties.label: Shared teams
properties.description: Additional teams whose users can access the record based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows or APIs.

properties.name: hs_shared_user_ids
properties.label: Shared users
properties.description: Additional users that can access the record based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows and APIs.

properties.name: hs_unique_creation_key
properties.label: Unique creation key
properties.description: Unique property used for idempotent creates

properties.name: hs_updated_by_user_id
properties.label: Updated by user ID
properties.description: The user who last updated this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

properties.name: hs_user_ids_of_all_notification_followers
properties.label: User IDs of all notification followers
properties.description: The user IDs of all users that have clicked follow within the object to opt-in to getting follow notifications

properties.name: hs_user_ids_of_all_notification_unfollowers
properties.label: User IDs of all notification unfollowers
properties.description: The user IDs of all object owners that have clicked unfollow within the object to opt-out of getting follow notifications

properties.name: hs_user_ids_of_all_owners
properties.label: User IDs of all owners
properties.description: The user IDs of all owners of this record.

properties.name: hs_was_imported
properties.label: Performed in an import
properties.description: Object is part of an import

properties.name: hubspot_owner_assigneddate
properties.label: Owner assigned date
properties.description: The most recent timestamp of when an owner was assigned to this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

properties.name: hubspot_owner_id
properties.label: Owner
properties.description: The owner of the object.

properties.name: hubspot_team_id
properties.label: Owner's main team
properties.description: The main team of the record owner. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

Links sub task to parent task
Links blocking task to blocked task
Links blocked task to blocking task
